summary: This topic explains how to define and manage vehicle routes, which include assigning a vehicle, specifying pick-up/drop points, timings, and associated charges. It also covers options for copying routes from previous sessions and bulk uploading pick-up points via Excel.
steps: To create a new route, click 'New Vehicle Route'.
Select the 'Vehicle' that will operate on this route from the dropdown list.
Optionally, select 'Skip Installment(s)' if transport fees should not be charged for specific installments (e.g., June).
Enter the 'Amount' for this pick-up point (e.g., 2000).
Optionally, enter 'Longitude' and 'Latitude' for GPS tracking.
Click 'Add' to save the pick-up point. Repeat for multiple points.
To add pick-up points in bulk via Excel:
Download the 'Sample Excel' to understand the required format.
Prepare your Excel file with 'Pick-up Point Name', 'Amount', 'Pick-up Time', 'Drop Time', 'Latitude', and 'Longitude' (Pick-up/Drop Time, Latitude/Longitude are non-mandatory for Excel upload).
business_rules: Transport fees for selected 'Skip Installment(s)' will not be charged to students assigned to this route.
Employee data for drivers must be pre-configured in the HRM module to be available for assignment.
When uploading pick-up points via Excel, 'Pick-up Point Name' and 'Amount' are mandatory. 'Pick-up Time', 'Drop Time', 'Latitude', and 'Longitude' are non-mandatory.
important_notes: The 'Copy from Session' feature allows duplicating vehicle routes from a previous academic session.
The system will generate an error file if there are issues during Excel upload (e.g., missing mandatory data).
Existing pick-up points can be edited or new ones added to an existing route.
questions: How do I define a new bus route?
What is the purpose of the 'Skip Installment' option in vehicle route setup?
Can I assign multiple drivers to a single route?
How can I add many pick-up points to a route efficiently?
What fields are mandatory when adding pick-up points manually?
What happens if my Excel upload for pick-up points has errors?
